name: Starfend
short_description: Place defenses strategically, upgrade and combine them. Protect planet orbits with your fleet. Face hordes of meteors in endless 3D levels. Compete on the global leaderboard! Can you make it to the top 10?
detailed_description:
Welcome to Starfend, a 3D tower defense game based on space! Take control of powerful drones to protect Earth from meteor waves. With dynamic, randomly generated maps, every match is a new challenge. Strategically position your drones to thwart incoming threats, utilizing their unique abilities. Move your main drone freely around the battlefield, randomly targetting but you can click on meteor to set a target. Upgrade your drones as you progress, combining their cannons increase some cannons status and gain mini drones.

Compete on the global leaderboard to see who has beaten the most stages! Can you make it to the top 10?

Controls:
Keyboard + mouse:
W - move forward, S - move backward, A - move left, D - move right, Q - move down, E - move up.
Hold mouse right click and drag to look around, R - reset camera position.
mouse scroll to zoom in and out. Mouse left click for interactions.

Joystick:
Leftstick - move foward, backward, left, right, L1 - move up, L2, move down, Rightstick - look around.
R1 virtual mouse interactions, R2 toggle virtual mouse.

supported_languages:
English*, French*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Simplified Chinese*, Korean*, Spanish - Latin America*, Japanese*, Portuguese - Brazil*, Portuguese - Portugal*, Russian*, Turkish*
*languages with full audio support
